title: The Shadow in the Study
openingIncident: At 8:55 pm, Astrid Pembly, retired university lecturer, was found dead in the cluttered home office. Three people had been present during the final minutes, and each gave a different account. Nothing outside the room is needed to identify the killer.

suspects.name: Evelyn Fothergill
suspects.statement: At 8:45 pm, Lysandra Wellesley helped me move the shoe aside. We left the room together immediately afterwards. Cedric Markham and Astrid Pembly were still inside.
suspects.alibiClaim: Lysandra Wellesley and I were together outside the room from 8:45 pm until the discovery at 8:55 pm.

suspects.name: Cedric Markham
suspects.statement: I left at 8:40 pm. I never touched the water bottle and did not go near the remote control.
suspects.alibiClaim: I had already left the room by 8:40 pm and did not return.

suspects.name: Lysandra Wellesley
suspects.statement: At 8:45 pm, I helped Evelyn Fothergill move the shoe aside. We then left together and remained together until the body was found at 8:55 pm.
suspects.alibiClaim: Evelyn Fothergill and I were together outside the room from 8:45 pm until the discovery at 8:55 pm.

clues.title: Granules in Water Bottle
clues.detail: Undissolved blue granules cling below the liquid line inside the water bottle. The same blue residue is visible at Astrid Pembly's lips and in the remaining drink.

clues.title: Position of Shoe
clues.detail: The fresh contact mark left by the shoe is crossed by a narrow blue droplet from the spilled poisoned drink whose edge remains unbroken. Evelyn Fothergill and Lysandra Wellesley both state that they moved the shoe aside at 8:45 pm before leaving together.

clues.title: Fibres on Water Bottle
clues.detail: Fine copper-coloured silk threads are caught around the handle and rim of the water bottle. Cedric Markham's copper silk pocket square has a fresh narrow tear, exposing the same alternating copper and navy stripe.

clues.title: Fragment at Remote Control
clues.detail: A curved black lacquer chip edged in gold is lodged in a narrow edge of the remote control on top of a narrow blue droplet from the spilled poisoned drink. The black-and-gold fountain-pen cap worn by Cedric Markham has a fresh curved gap in the lacquer; the exposed edges visibly fit the fragment.

clues.title: Mark on Backpack
clues.detail: A dark mark crosses the backpack. The same intact factory finish continues over the marked area.

solution.motive: Cedric Markham killed Astrid Pembly because a long-buried family secret that threatened to destroy a reputation because of a tell-all memoir in the works.
solution.method: A fatal crushed dose was dissolved in the water bottle before Astrid Pembly drank.
solution.timeOfDeath: After 8:45 pm and before discovery at 8:55 pm
solution.opportunity: Cedric Markham claimed to have left at 8:40 pm. The timeline evidence places the attack after Evelyn Fothergill and Lysandra Wellesley left together at 8:45 pm; the fine copper-coloured silk threads on the water bottle and the black and gold fragment recovered from the remote control place Cedric Markham inside afterwards. Cedric Markham therefore had the only evidenced opportunity to be alone with Astrid Pembly and reach the water bottle during the murder window.
